# Copilot Skills in This Repository

This folder stores reusable Copilot skills for this codebase.

## Folder And Filename Convention

- Use lowercase kebab-case for skill folder names.
- Each skill folder must contain exactly one `SKILL.md` file.
- Keep one topic per skill.
- Keep descriptions explicit so the right skill can be selected automatically.

## Structure

- `.github/skills/<skill-folder>/SKILL.md`

## Naming Examples

- `.github/skills/ddev-workflow-guard/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/phinx-migration-enforcer/SKILL.md`

## Authoring Guidelines

- Write all content in English.
- Prefer imperative instructions and short checklists.
- Include clear `Use When` and `Do Not Use When` sections.
- Keep project-specific rules aligned with `AGENT.md`.
